summary: Unpinned action (best practice: `actions/checkout@v4` should be SHA-pinned with version comment). Non-portable `/dev/stdin` in version-bumper.ts:164 fails on Windows (though workflow uses fixtures only, this code path is unmaintainable). Minor redundancy in test assertions (run-act-tests.ts:40-60, lines like `assertContains(workflowContent, 'push:', ...)` could loop). Fixture detection logic is implicit/fragile (defaults to 'fixtures/test-case.json' but workflow uses different names). Otherwise solid TypeScript with good separation and error messages.
